text: JDA Phase 1 fund mechanism deployment per the Lighthouse Foundation Document and the NWGA Regional Cooperative Architectural Foundation. Counties pool idle cash into professionally managed Treasury investment portfolio designed by Regions Bank. Twenty million dollar target across the four counties. Catoosa contributes seven million dollars from Hutcheson Hospital sale proceeds. Walker contributes seven million dollars through direct ask. Dade contributes three million dollars through Bank of Dade. Chattooga contributes three million dollars through SouthEast Bank. The fund operates inside Georgia public finance law with full compliance. The fund earns two percent service charge on cash flow supporting cooperative initiative working capital. The cooperative initiative operates under JDA umbrella through phase one and reorganizes into independent cooperative once operations are figured out.

DECISION_PACKET.title: Approve Phase 1 fund mechanism deployment ($20M across four counties)
red_items: no coercion of member counties into participation beyond their commissioners' authority
no exploitation of public funds for private gain — fund operates inside Georgia public finance law with full compliance
no deception about fund mechanics, fee structure, or service charge to member counties or cooperative initiative beneficiaries
no extraction structure that would route fees away from cooperative operations toward narrow benefit
no commitments that would preclude later reorganization into independent cooperative once operations are figured out
floor_items: fund operates inside Georgia public finance law with full compliance — Regions Bank professional management
two percent service charge on cash flow is the only fee — no layered fee extraction
professionally managed Treasury investment portfolio — capital preservation as primary objective
cooperative initiative under JDA umbrella through phase one — institutional standing inherited from JDA
phase one focused exclusively on fund deployment and producer cooperative pilot cohort (3-5 mid-scale family farms)
no pursuit during phase one of TRS Georgia mandate engagement, token deployment with external market exposure, multi-state platform deployment, or population-scale wealth management vision
minimum to start discipline operates centrally — Phase 1 non-fund startup capital approximately $125K-$260K for first year
DECISION_PACKET.way_path: Approve fund mechanism formation through JDA. Confirm $20M target with Catoosa $7M (Hutcheson sale proceeds), Walker $7M (direct ask), Dade $3M (Bank of Dade), Chattooga $3M (SouthEast Bank). Engage Regions Bank for professional Treasury portfolio management. Operate inside Georgia public finance law with specialized counsel review of every structural element. Earn 2% service charge on cash flow supporting cooperative initiative working capital. Launch producer cooperative member pilot cohort of 3-5 mid-scale family farms with package terms operating inside Subchapter T cooperative law. Working capital flows through fund mechanism rather than through separate capital sourcing. Reorganize into independent cooperative once operations are figured out.
execution_steps: Specialized counsel review of fund mechanism structure for Georgia public finance law compliance
Engage Regions Bank for professional Treasury portfolio management and document the management agreement
Confirm county commissioner authority and appropriations process for each contribution: Catoosa $7M, Walker $7M, Dade $3M, Chattooga $3M
Document the 2% service charge mechanism and its flow into cooperative initiative working capital
Form the JDA fund mechanism with documented governance and reporting cadence
Identify and confirm pilot cohort of 3-5 mid-scale family farms for producer cooperative member program
Document package terms (monthly draws, benefits, transition insurance, primary customer commitment) operating inside Subchapter T
Launch fund operations with quarterly reporting to JDA board and to member-county commissioners
Operate Phase 1 with no expansion into Phase 2 targets until foundation cell substance supports it
scripture_anchors: Mic 6:8 — to act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God
Prov 22:16 — He who oppresses the poor to increase his wealth shall come to want
Matt 10:16 — wise as serpents and harmless as doves
Eccl 3:1 — to every thing there is a season
